reviews.comment:
La atención es malísima!!! pongan gente que si tenga ganas de ganarse el sueldo a fin de mes!!!de noche se ponen a limpiar el piso y no te quieren vender combustible!!!la aplicación ypf de noche no la podes usar,te dicen que no funciona y las tarjetas menos!!!!una mala onda tienen!!! pésimo servicio!!!!

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible!!! Hire people who actually want to earn their paycheck at the end of the month!!! At night they're cleaning the floor and won't sell you fuel!!! You can't use the YPF app at night, they tell you it doesn't work, and the cards are even worse!!!! They're so unfriendly!!! Awful service!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURWcjUzeDhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Eventualmente cargo en el ACA porque me queda relativamente cerca y siempre tienen variedad de combustible. Pero estoy cansado de que los playeros tengan tan mala predisposición y tanta paja para atenderte, son 2 playeros para 6 lugares de surtidores, o están los 2 en la computadora para cobrar una carga y se hacen los desentendidos. Los ves tomando mate mientras uno sin hacer cola, porque no hay nadie, está 15 min en espera para que te carguen. Para colmo no te saludan ni dirigen la mirada si ese día están cruzados. Me cansé de bancarme los tratos desagradables de los playeros de ahí. Cambiaré mi calificación si le ponen más onda el día de mañana.

(Translated by Google)
I occasionally fill up at ACA because it's relatively close and they always have a variety of fuel. But I'm tired of the unfriendly and lazy beach attendants. There are two beach attendants for six pumping stations, or both are at the computer charging for a fill-up and act oblivious. You see them sipping mate while someone, without waiting in line, waits 15 minutes to be refueled because there's no one there. To top it all off, they don't even greet you or even look at you if they're standing right next to you that day. I'm tired of putting up with the unpleasant behavior of the beach attendants there. I'll change my rating if they're more friendly tomorrow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9200897225069866922/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkM09MbTRBRRAB
